notes:
## What's New in v0.8.0

### Platform
- Intel Mac support (x86_64 dual-architecture builds)
- Client↔backend version compatibility gate
- Self-hoster update UX (guided backend upgrade flow)

### Remote backend
- Dual-mode connectivity with safe local↔remote switching
- Mode-switch data transfer + remote mode UI polish
- Remote-mode backup UI (iOS backend readiness)

### Navigation & productivity
- GoToSubPanel (⌘O) — global entity search and navigation
- Unified mentions search with fuzzy matching
- Custom list reordering — drag-and-drop + keyboard shortcuts
- ⌥↑/⌥↓ keyboard reorder across entity sections
- Page-jump (Page Up/Down) and first/last keyboard navigation
- Shift+Arrow bulk selection with anchor-based extend/contract
- Click-to-cycle status and priority icons everywhere

### Entities
- Entity template system — reusable templates with clone + filter integration
- Inline entity creation from SubPanels across all pages
- Milestone sub-grouping in task list project sort
- Milestone linking/unlinking mutations
- RRULE recurrence UI + NLP parser

### Summary & onboarding
- Summary sections — unified data pipeline with settings UI
- Onboarding setup wizard for first-run users

### Bug fixes
- Resolve Intel WKWebView "Load failed" (signal forwarding, retry guard)
- Distinguish route-change cancellations from real timeouts in GraphQL client
- Search index delete triggers + stale result discard
